image_prompt: A very hot, sunny summer day scene at a beach or park. A comical, slightly frustrated character is trying to eat a rapidly melting, multi-scoop ice cream cone, with drips running everywhere. The sun is beaming brightly. The Portuguese sentence "No verão, o sorvete derrete." is incorporated as melting text on the ice cream itself, or as a sign on a nearby ice cream truck. Bright, exaggerated, humorous, Imagen 3 style.
caption: Quem nunca lutou contra um sorvete derretendo no verão? É a lei da natureza! 😂 Qual a sua estratégia para não perder uma gota? #VerãoQuente #SorveteDerretendo #CoisasDeVerão #Calorão #VerdadesUniversais
